---
title: "Celigo Object level plots"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r Obj-lvl-Scatter-Plot}
# Specify source to plot
source_to_plot <- "Run 10"  # Change this

# Create plot data with condition labels and threshold status
plot_data <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                          Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                          !is.na(Gated_PC)]

plot_data[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]
plot_data[, Threshold_Label := ifelse(Gated_PC, "Gated", "Ungated")]

# Plot
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity, y = DAPI.Integrated.Intensity, 
                           color = interaction(Condition_Label, Threshold_Label))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.1) +
  #stat_density_2d(linewidth = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "- PMA.Gated" = "black",
      "+ PMA.Gated" = "red",
      "- PMA.Ungated" = "royalblue",
      "+ PMA.Ungated" = "goldenrod"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "- PMA (Gated)",
      "+ PMA (Gated)",
      "- PMA (Ungated)",
      "+ PMA (Ungated)"
    ),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        shape = 15,   # large square
        size = 5,     # size of legend symbol
        alpha = 1     # fully visible
      )
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("BF vs DAPI - ", source_to_plot),
    x = "Bright Field Integrated Intensity",
    y = "DAPI Integrated Intensity"
  )

print(p)
ggsave(paste0("pca-fed-scatterBD_", gsub(" ", "", source_to_plot), ".png"), 
       plot = p, width = 6, height = 5)
```
    
```{r Obj-lvl-Scatter-Plot-v2}
# --- 1. Prepare data ---
source_to_plot <- "Run 10"

threshold <- 25

plot_data <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                          Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                          !is.na(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`)]

# Calculate percentages above threshold for each condition
pct_summary <- Object_Table[Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA", "Cells Only No Stain + PMA") & Source == source_to_plot & 
                            !is.na(DAPI.Mean.Intensity), .(
  pct_above = sum(DAPI.Mean.Intensity >= threshold) / .N * 100
), by = .(Condition)]

# Create label text
label_text <- paste0( 
  pct_summary$Condition, ": ", round(pct_summary$pct_above, 1), "%",
  collapse = "\n"
)

# Condition labels
plot_data[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]

# Subset thresholded cells
dt_threshold <- plot_data[`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity` == TRUE]

# --- 2. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c("- PMA" = "royalblue", "+ PMA" = "goldenrod")

# --- 3. Plot ---
p <- ggplot() +
  # Scatter all cells by condition
  geom_point(data = plot_data, 
             aes(x = DAPI.Mean.Intensity, y = MPO.Mean.Intensity, color = Condition_Label),
             alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  
  # Density lines for thresholded cells, all red
  geom_density_2d(data = dt_threshold, 
                  aes(x = DAPI.Mean.Intensity, y = MPO.Mean.Intensity),
                  color = "red",
                  linewidth = 1) +
  
  # Threshold line
   geom_vline(xintercept = threshold, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  annotate("text", x = threshold * 1.1, y = mean(plot_data$MPO.Mean.Intensity), na.rm = TRUE, 
           label = paste0("Cells Above Threshold\n", label_text), hjust = 0, vjust = 0, size = 3.5, color = "black") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Scatter of Cells with Thresholded Density Overlay - ", source_to_plot),
    x = "DAPI Mean Intensity",
    y = "MPO Mean Intensity"
  )

print(p)

ggsave(paste0("scatter_thresholded2x_red_", gsub(" ", "", source_to_plot), ".png"),
       plot = p, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```
    
```{r Obj-lvl-Scatter-Plot-v3}
# --- 1. Prepare data ---
source_to_plot <- "Run 9"

plot_data <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                          Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                          !is.na(DAPI.Mean.Intensity) & !is.na(MPO.Mean.Intensity)]

# Condition labels
plot_data[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]

# Subset thresholded cells (10-Fold threshold)
dt_threshold <- plot_data[`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity` == TRUE]

# --- 2. Calculate % below diagonal threshold ---
pct_summary <- plot_data[, .(
  pct_below_diag = sum(MPO.Mean.Intensity <= DAPI.Mean.Intensity + 25) / .N * 100
), by = Condition]

label_text <- paste0(
  pct_summary$Condition, ": ", round(pct_summary$pct_below_diag, 1), "%",
  collapse = "\n"
)

# --- 3. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c("- PMA" = "royalblue", "+ PMA" = "goldenrod")

# --- 4. Plot ---
p <- ggplot() +
  # Scatter of all cells
  geom_point(data = plot_data,
             aes(x = DAPI.Mean.Intensity, y = MPO.Mean.Intensity, color = Condition_Label),
             alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +

  # Density lines of thresholded cells (red)
  geom_density_2d(data = dt_threshold,
                  aes(x = DAPI.Mean.Intensity, y = MPO.Mean.Intensity),
                  color = "red",
                  linewidth = 1) +

  # Diagonal y = x threshold line
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 25,
              linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 1) +

  # Annotate y = x threshold
  annotate("text", x = max(plot_data$DAPI.Mean.Intensity) * 0.6, 
           y = max(plot_data$DAPI.Mean.Intensity) * 0.62,
           label = "y = x + 25 threshold", color = "black", hjust = 0, size = 4) +

  # Annotate % below diagonal
  annotate("text", x = max(plot_data$DAPI.Mean.Intensity) * 0.6, 
           y = max(plot_data$MPO.Mean.Intensity) * 0.5,
           label = paste0("Cells Below Diagonal\n", label_text),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 0, size = 4, color = "black") +

  scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Scatter with Threshold y = x - ", source_to_plot),
    x = "DAPI Mean Intensity",
    y = "MPO Mean Intensity"
  )

print(p)

ggsave(paste0("scatter_y_equals_xplus25_threshold_", gsub(" ", "", source_to_plot), ".png"),
       plot = p, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```
    
```{r Obj-lvl-Scatter-Plot-v4}
# --- 1. USER SETTINGS ---
source_to_plot <- "Run 10"
x_measure <- "DAPI.Integrated.Intensity"
y_measure <- "MPO.Mean.Intensity"

# Y-intercept options: numeric value, "Q1", "Q1-median", or "median"
y_intercept_type <- "Q1-median"  # Change this to: 25, "Q1", "Q1-median", or "median"

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
plot_data <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                          Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                          !is.na(get(x_measure)) & !is.na(get(y_measure))]

plot_data[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]
dt_threshold <- plot_data[`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity` == TRUE]

# --- 3. Calculate y-intercept ---
if (is.numeric(y_intercept_type)) {
  y_intercept <- y_intercept_type
  intercept_label <- as.character(y_intercept)
} else if (y_intercept_type == "Q1") {
  y_intercept <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  intercept_label <- "Q1"
} else if (y_intercept_type == "Q1-median") {
  q1 <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  med <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_intercept <- (q1 + med) / 2
  intercept_label <- "Q1-Med"
} else if (y_intercept_type == "median") {
  y_intercept <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  intercept_label <- "Median"
}

# --- 4. Calculate % below diagonal threshold ---
pct_summary <- plot_data[, .(
  pct_below_diag = sum(get(y_measure) <= get(x_measure) + y_intercept) / .N * 100
), by = Condition]

label_text <- paste0(
  pct_summary$Condition, ": ", round(pct_summary$pct_below_diag, 1), "%",
  collapse = "\n"
)

# --- 5. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c("- PMA" = "royalblue", "+ PMA" = "goldenrod")

# --- 6. Get data ranges for proper scaling ---
x_range <- range(plot_data[[x_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- range(plot_data[[y_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)

# --- 7. Plot ---
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = plot_data,
             aes(x = .data[[x_measure]], y = .data[[y_measure]], color = Condition_Label),
             alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  
  geom_density_2d(data = dt_threshold,
                  aes(x = .data[[x_measure]], y = .data[[y_measure]]),
                  color = "red",
                  linewidth = 1,
                  bins = 5) +
  
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = y_intercept,
              linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  
  annotate("text", x = x_range[2] * 0.6, 
           y = y_range[2] * 0.95,
           label = paste0("y = x + ", round(y_intercept, 1), " (", intercept_label, ")"), 
           color = "black", hjust = 0, size = 4) +
  
  annotate("text", x = x_range[2] * 0.6, 
           y = y_range[2] * 0.85,
           label = paste0("Cells Below Diagonal\n", label_text),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "black") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_range, ylim = y_range) +  # Fix scale to data
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Scatter with Threshold - ", source_to_plot),
    x = gsub("\\.", " ", x_measure),
    y = gsub("\\.", " ", y_measure)
  )

print(p)

# --- 8. Save with descriptive filename ---
x_clean <- gsub("\\.", "_", x_measure)
y_clean <- gsub("\\.", "_", y_measure)
intercept_clean <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "", intercept_label)

ggsave(paste0("scatter_", y_clean, "_vs_", x_clean, "_", intercept_clean, "_", 
              gsub(" ", "", source_to_plot), ".png"),
       plot = p, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```
    
```{r Obj-lvl-Scatter-Plot-v5}
# --- 1. USER SETTINGS ---
source_to_plot <- "Run 7"
y_measure <- "MPO.Mean.Intensity"
x_measure <- "DAPI.Mean.Intensity"


# Y-intercept options: numeric value, "Q1", "Q1-median", or "median"
y_intercept_type <- "Q1-median"

# Use z-scored threshold? (TRUE = threshold based on z-scores, FALSE = raw values)
use_zscore_threshold <- TRUE

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
plot_data <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                          Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                          !is.na(get(x_measure)) & !is.na(get(y_measure))]

plot_data[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]
dt_threshold <- plot_data[`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity` == TRUE]

# --- 3. Calculate y-intercept (always from raw data) ---
if (is.numeric(y_intercept_type)) {
  y_intercept <- y_intercept_type
  intercept_label <- as.character(y_intercept)
} else if (y_intercept_type == "Q1") {
  y_intercept <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  intercept_label <- "Q1"
} else if (y_intercept_type == "Q1-median") {
  q1 <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  med <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  y_intercept <- (q1 + med) / 2
  intercept_label <- "Q1-Med"
} else if (y_intercept_type == "median") {
  y_intercept <- quantile(plot_data[[y_measure]], 0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  intercept_label <- "Median"
}

# --- 4. Calculate slope and apply threshold ---
if (use_zscore_threshold) {
  x_sd <- sd(plot_data[[x_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
  y_sd <- sd(plot_data[[y_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Z-scored slope (keeps y = x relationship in standardized space)
  slope_raw <- y_sd / x_sd
  intercept_raw <- y_intercept
  
  # For threshold calculation, we need to check: y <= slope * x + intercept
  pct_summary <- plot_data[, .(
    pct_below_diag = sum(get(y_measure) <= slope_raw * get(x_measure) + y_intercept) / .N * 100
  ), by = Condition]
  
} else {
  # Raw value approach: y = x + intercept
  slope_raw <- 1
  intercept_raw <- y_intercept
  
  pct_summary <- plot_data[, .(
    pct_below_diag = sum(get(y_measure) <= get(x_measure) + y_intercept) / .N * 100
  ), by = Condition]
}

label_text <- paste0(
  pct_summary$Condition, ": ", round(pct_summary$pct_below_diag, 1), "%",
  collapse = "\n"
)

# --- 5. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c("- PMA" = "royalblue", "+ PMA" = "goldenrod")

# --- 6. Get data ranges ---
x_range <- range(plot_data[[x_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- range(plot_data[[y_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)

# --- 7. Plot ---
p <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(data = plot_data,
             aes(x = .data[[x_measure]], y = .data[[y_measure]], color = Condition_Label),
             alpha = 0.1, size = 0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(slope = slope_raw, intercept = intercept_raw,
              linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  
  geom_density_2d(data = dt_threshold,
                  aes(x = .data[[x_measure]], y = .data[[y_measure]]),
                  color = "red",
                  linewidth = 1,
                  bins = 5) +
  
  annotate("text", 
           #x = x_range[2] * 0.6,
           x = 0,
           y = y_range[2] * 0.95,
           label = paste0(ifelse(use_zscore_threshold, "z-scored slope, ", ""),
                         "y-int = ", round(y_intercept, 1), " (", intercept_label, ")"), 
           color = "black", hjust = 0, size = 4) +
  
  annotate("text", 
           #x = x_range[2] * 0.6,
           x = 0,
           y = y_range[2] * 0.85,
           label = paste0("Cells Below Diagonal\n", label_text),
           hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 4, color = "black") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = x_range, ylim = y_range) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Scatter with Threshold - ", source_to_plot),
    x = gsub("\\.", " ", x_measure),
    y = gsub("\\.", " ", y_measure)
  )

print(p)

# --- 8. Save ---
x_clean <- gsub("\\.", "_", x_measure)
y_clean <- gsub("\\.", "_", y_measure)
intercept_clean <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]", "", intercept_label)
zscore_suffix <- ifelse(use_zscore_threshold, "_zscore", "")

ggsave(paste0("scatter_", y_clean, "_vs_", x_clean, "_", intercept_clean, zscore_suffix, "_", 
              gsub(" ", "", source_to_plot), ".png"),
       plot = p, width = 6, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r Apply-and-Attach-v5-threshold-old}
src <- "Run 7"
y_measure <- "MPO.Mean.Intensity"
x_measure <- "DAPI.Mean.Intensity"


# Calculate threshold parameters from controls only
thresh_params <- Object_Table[Source == src & 
                              Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                              !is.na(get(x_measure)) & !is.na(get(y_measure))]

x_sd <- sd(thresh_params[[x_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
y_sd <- sd(thresh_params[[y_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
slope_raw <- y_sd / x_sd

q1 <- quantile(thresh_params[[y_measure]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
med <- quantile(thresh_params[[y_measure]], 0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
y_intercept <- (q1 + med) / 2

# Apply threshold to ALL conditions in this source
Object_Table[Source == src & 
             !is.na(get(x_measure)) & !is.na(get(y_measure)), 
             Below_Diagonal := get(y_measure) <= slope_raw * get(x_measure) + y_intercept]

# Summarize per well (now includes all conditions)
well_totals <- Object_Table[Source == src & !is.na(Below_Diagonal), 
                            .(total_points = .N), by = .(Well, Source)]
diag_summary <- Object_Table[Source == src & Below_Diagonal == TRUE, 
                             .(Diag_Thresh_points = .N), by = .(Well, Source, Condition)]

diag_summary[Condition == "Cells Only\n+ PMA", Condition := "Cells Only + PMA"]

diag_summary <- merge(diag_summary, well_totals, by = c("Well", "Source"), all.y = TRUE)
diag_summary[is.na(Diag_Thresh_points), Diag_Thresh_points := 0]
diag_summary[, Fraction.Below.Diagonal := Diag_Thresh_points / total_points]

x_init <- paste0(substr(unlist(strsplit(x_measure, "\\.")), 1, 1), collapse = "")
y_init <- paste0(substr(unlist(strsplit(y_measure, "\\.")), 1, 1), collapse = "")

NET_Data_Combined[diag_summary, paste0("Fraction.Below.", y_init, ".vs.", x_init, ".Diagonal") := i.Fraction.Below.Diagonal, 
                  on = c("Well", "Source")]
```

```{r Apply-and-Attach-v5-threshold-v2}
src <- "Run 7"
y_measure <- "MPO.Mean.Intensity"
x_measure <- "DAPI.Mean.Intensity"

# Calculate threshold parameters from controls only
thresh_params <- Object_Table[Source == src & 
                              Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                              !is.na(get(x_measure)) & !is.na(get(y_measure))]

x_sd <- sd(thresh_params[[x_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
y_sd <- sd(thresh_params[[y_measure]], na.rm = TRUE)
slope_raw <- y_sd / x_sd

q1 <- quantile(thresh_params[[y_measure]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
med <- quantile(thresh_params[[y_measure]], 0.5, na.rm = TRUE)
y_intercept <- (q1 + med) / 2

# Apply threshold to ALL conditions in this source
Object_Table[Source == src & 
             !is.na(get(x_measure)) & !is.na(get(y_measure)), 
             Below_Diagonal := get(y_measure) <= slope_raw * get(x_measure) + y_intercept]

# Summarize per well - ADD Condition to both groupings
well_totals <- Object_Table[Source == src & !is.na(Below_Diagonal), 
                            .(total_points = .N), by = .(Well, Source, Condition)]

diag_summary <- Object_Table[Source == src & Below_Diagonal == TRUE, 
                             .(Diag_Thresh_points = .N), by = .(Well, Source, Condition)]

# Fix condition name BEFORE merge
diag_summary[Condition == "Cells Only\n+ PMA", Condition := "Cells Only + PMA"]
well_totals[Condition == "Cells Only\n+ PMA", Condition := "Cells Only + PMA"]

# Merge on Well, Source, AND Condition
diag_summary <- merge(diag_summary, well_totals, by = c("Well", "Source", "Condition"), all.y = TRUE)

diag_summary[is.na(Diag_Thresh_points), Diag_Thresh_points := 0]
diag_summary[, Fraction.Below.Diagonal := Diag_Thresh_points / total_points]

# Create dynamic column name
x_init <- paste0(substr(unlist(strsplit(x_measure, "\\.")), 1, 1), collapse = "")
y_init <- paste0(substr(unlist(strsplit(y_measure, "\\.")), 1, 1), collapse = "")

# Fix condition name in NET_Data_Combined before merge
NET_Data_Combined[Condition == "Cells Only\n+ PMA", Condition := "Cells Only + PMA"]

# Merge into NET_Data_Combined
NET_Data_Combined[diag_summary, 
                  paste0("Fraction.Below.", y_init, ".vs.", x_init, ".Diagonal") := i.Fraction.Below.Diagonal, 
                  on = c("Well", "Source")]

# Return condition name in NET_Data_Combined after merge
NET_Data_Combined[Condition == "Cells Only + PMA", Condition := "Cells Only\n+ PMA"]
```

```{r debug}
# Check if well-level conditions match object-level
Object_Table[Source == "Run 10", .(cells_per_well = .N), by = .(Well, Condition)]
NET_Data_Combined[Source == "Run 10", .(Well, Condition)]
```
    
```{r Obj-lvl-Scatter-Plot-only-gated}
# Specify source to plot
source_to_plot <- "Run 10"  # Change this

# Create plot data with condition labels and threshold status
plot_data <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                          Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                          !is.na(Gated_PC) & 
                          MPO.Mean.Intensity >= 12 &  
                          DAPI.Mean.Intensity >= 12 &    
                          Gated_PC == TRUE
                          ]

plot_data[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]

# Plot
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = DAPI.Mean.Intensity, y = MPO.Mean.Intensity, color = Condition_Label)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, size = 0.1) +
  stat_density_2d(linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "- PMA" = "darkblue",
      "+ PMA" = "darkorange"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "- PMA",
      "+ PMA"
    ),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        shape = 15,  # large square
        size = 5,    # size of legend symbol
        alpha = 1    # fully visible
      )
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("DAPI vs MPO - ", source_to_plot),
    x = "DAPI Mean Intensity",
    y = "MPO Mean Intensity"
  )

print(p)
ggsave(paste0("pca-fed-gatescatterDM_", gsub(" ", "", source_to_plot), ".png"), 
       plot = p, width = 6, height = 5)
```
    
```{r PCA-scatterplot}
# Specify source to plot
source_to_plot <- "Run 7"  # Change this

# Create plot data with renamed conditions
plot_data <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                          Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA")]
plot_data[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]

# Plot
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Condition_Label)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.05, size = 0.1) +
  stat_density_2d(linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("- PMA" = "royalblue", "+ PMA" = "goldenrod")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("PCA of ", source_to_plot),
    x = "PC1",
    y = "PC2"
  )

print(p)
ggsave(paste0("PCA_", gsub(" ", "", source_to_plot), ".png"), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 4)
```

```{r Violin-plot1}
use_scatter_gate <- FALSE 
use_PC_gate <- FALSE

tdf <- if (use_PC_gate) {
    Object_Table[Gated_PC == TRUE]
} else {
    Object_Table
}

tdf <- if (use_scatter_gate) {
    Object_Table[in_gate == TRUE]
} else {
    Object_Table
}

y_var <- "Area"
plot_title <- paste0("Distribution of ",  y_var, " (", unique(Object_Table$Mask), "_Mask)")
plot_title <- gsub("[._]", " ", plot_title)

  



save_title <- paste0("violin-plot_", y_var, "_", unique(Object_Table$Mask), "_Mask.png")
save_title <- gsub(" ", "_", save_title)

# Subset your columns if needed
df <- tdf[, .(Column, y = get(y_var))]

# filter
df <- df[Column %in% c("1", "2", "3", "4", "5")]
# Convert Column to factor for plotting
df[, Column := factor(Column, levels = c("1", "2", "3", "4", "5"),
                              labels = c("No Stain", "Cells Only", "+ PMA", "Polyester Colors", "Polyester Colors\n+ UV"))]
 

# Create a color mapping for your Column variable
unique_columns <- unique(df$Column)

# Define any colors you want to manually set
column_colors <- c(
  #"2" = "red",
  #"3" = "blue"
  # Add more if you have specific columns you want specific colors for
)

# Get predefined colors
active_column_colors <- column_colors[names(column_colors) %in% unique_columns]

# Auto-generate for missing columns
missing_columns <- setdiff(unique_columns, names(column_colors))
if (length(missing_columns) > 0) {
  cat("Generating colors for columns:", paste(missing_columns, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  new_colors <- brewer.pal(max(3, length(missing_columns)), "Set1")[1:length(missing_columns)]
  names(new_colors) <- missing_columns
  active_column_colors <- c(active_column_colors, new_colors)
}
# Ensure colors are in same order as unique_columns
active_column_colors <- active_column_colors[as.character(unique_columns)]



# Basic violin plot
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Column, y = y, fill = Column)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6, scale = "width") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 1.5, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = active_column_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Population",
    y = y_var,
    fill = "Condition",
    title = plot_title
  )

ggsave(save_title, plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)
cat(save_title)

print(p)

```

```{r Violin1-with-mixedANOVA}

use_gate <- FALSE 
tdf <- if (use_gate) {
    Object_Table[in_gate == TRUE]
} else {
    Object_Table
}

y_var <- "MPO:.Mean.Intensity"
plot_title <- paste0("Distribution of ",  y_var, " (", unique(Object_Table$Mask), "_Mask)")
plot_title <- gsub("[._]", " ", plot_title)
  
save_title <- paste0("violin-plot_", y_var, "_", unique(Object_Table$Mask), "_Mask.png")
save_title <- gsub(" ", "_", save_title)

df <- tdf[, .(Column, Well, y = get(y_var))]
df <- df[Column %in% c("1", "2", "3", "4", "5")]
df[, Column := factor(Column, levels = c("1", "2", "3", "4", "5"),
                              labels = c("No Stain", "Cells Only", "+ PMA", 
                                       "Polyester Colors\nHeat Killed", 
                                       "Polyester Colors\n+ UV"))]

# Run mixed-effects model
model <- lmer(y ~ Column + (1|Well), data = df)

# Get pairwise comparisons
emm <- emmeans(model, ~ Column)
pairs_result <- pairs(emm)

# Extract p-values for specific comparisons
comparisons_list <- list(
  c("Cells Only", "+ PMA"),
  c("Cells Only", "Polyester Colors\nHeat Killed"),
  c("Cells Only", "Polyester Colors\n+ UV")
)

# Create labels with p-values from mixed model
pval_labels <- data.frame()
for (comp in comparisons_list) {
  pair_row <- summary(pairs_result)[
    (summary(pairs_result)$contrast == paste(comp[1], "-", comp[2]) |
     summary(pairs_result)$contrast == paste(comp[2], "-", comp[1])), 
  ]
  if (nrow(pair_row) > 0) {
    pval_labels <- rbind(pval_labels, data.frame(
      group1 = comp[1],
      group2 = comp[2],
      p.value = pair_row$p.value,
      p.label = ifelse(pair_row$p.value < 0.001, "p < 0.001", 
                      paste("p =", round(pair_row$p.value, 3)))
    ))
  }
}

# Generate colors
unique_columns <- unique(df$Column)
column_colors <- c()
active_column_colors <- column_colors[names(column_colors) %in% unique_columns]
missing_columns <- setdiff(unique_columns, names(column_colors))
if (length(missing_columns) > 0) {
  new_colors <- brewer.pal(max(3, length(missing_columns)), "Set1")[1:length(missing_columns)]
  names(new_colors) <- missing_columns
  active_column_colors <- c(active_column_colors, new_colors)
}
active_column_colors <- active_column_colors[as.character(unique_columns)]

# Create plot
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Column, y = y, fill = Column)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6, scale = "width") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 1.5, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = active_column_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Population",
    y = y_var,
    fill = "Condition",
    title = plot_title,
    subtitle = "Mixed-effects ANOVA accounting for well clustering"
  )

# Convert to data frame and sort by p-value
pairs_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_result)
pairs_df <- pairs_df[order(pairs_df$p.value), ]

# Add significance brackets for specified comparisons
y_max <- max(df$y, na.rm = TRUE)
y_range <- diff(range(df$y, na.rm = TRUE))

pairs_df <- as.data.frame(pairs_result)

for (i in seq_along(comparisons_list)) {
  comp <- comparisons_list[[i]]
  
  # Find the matching row in pairs_df
  pair_idx <- NULL
  for (j in 1:nrow(pairs_df)) {
    contrast_str <- as.character(pairs_df$contrast[j])
    groups <- strsplit(contrast_str, " - ")[[1]]
    group1 <- trimws(gsub("[()]", "", groups[1]))
    group2 <- trimws(gsub("[()]", "", groups[2]))
    
    if ((group1 == comp[1] && group2 == comp[2]) || 
        (group1 == comp[2] && group2 == comp[1])) {
      pair_idx <- j
      break
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(pair_idx)) {
    p_val <- pairs_df$p.value[pair_idx]
    p_label <- ifelse(p_val < 0.001, "p < 0.001", paste("p =", round(p_val, 4)))
    
    cat("\nComparison:", comp[1], "vs", comp[2], "- p =", p_val, "\n")
    
    y_pos <- y_max + y_range * (0.05 + (i-1) * 0.08)
    x1 <- which(levels(df$Column) == comp[1])
    x2 <- which(levels(df$Column) == comp[2])
    
    p <- p + 
      annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x2, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos, linewidth = 0.5) +
      annotate("segment", x = x1, xend = x1, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos - y_range*0.02, linewidth = 0.5) +
      annotate("segment", x = x2, xend = x2, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos - y_range*0.02, linewidth = 0.5) +
      annotate("text", x = (x1+x2)/2, y = y_pos + y_range*0.02, 
               label = p_label, size = 3)
  } else {
    cat("\nWARNING: Could not find comparison:", comp[1], "vs", comp[2], "\n")
  }
}

ggsave(save_title, plot = p, width = 8, height = 7)
cat(save_title, "\n")
print(summary(model))
print(pairs_result)
print(p)
```

```{r Violin-plot-2sources}

y_var <- "MPO: Mean Intensity"
plot_title <- paste0("Distribution of ",  y_var)
df <- dt_combined[, .(Column, y = get(y_var), Dataset)]

# filter
df <- df[Column %in% c("1", "2", "3", "4", "5")]

# Convert Column to factor for plotting
df[, Column := factor(Column, levels = c("1", "3", "2", "4", "5"),
                              labels = c("No Stain", "Cells Only", "+ PMA", "Polyester Colors\nHeat Killed", "Polyester Colors\n+ UV"))]

# === 3. Generate colors for DATASET (not Column) ===
unique_datasets <- unique(df$Dataset)

# Define manual colors for datasets if desired
dataset_colors <- c(
  "Experiment 1" = "lightblue",
  "Experiment 2" = "lightcoral"
)

# Get predefined colors
active_dataset_colors <- dataset_colors[names(dataset_colors) %in% unique_datasets]

# Auto-generate for missing datasets
missing_datasets <- setdiff(unique_datasets, names(dataset_colors))
if (length(missing_datasets) > 0) {
  cat("Generating colors for datasets:", paste(missing_datasets, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  new_colors <- brewer.pal(max(3, length(missing_datasets)), "Set1")[1:length(missing_datasets)]
  names(new_colors) <- missing_datasets
  active_dataset_colors <- c(active_dataset_colors, new_colors)
}

# Ensure colors are in same order as unique_datasets
active_dataset_colors <- active_dataset_colors[as.character(unique_datasets)]

# Basic violin plot
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Column, y = y, fill = Dataset)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6, scale = "width") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 1.5, color = "black",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = active_dataset_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Condition",
    y = y_var,
    fill = "Dataset",
    title = plot_title
  )

ggsave("violin-plot-MPO-2-source.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)

print(p)
```

```{r Gated-Cell-Visualize}
# === USER SETTINGS ===
well_to_overlay <- "A3"           # Which well to visualize
source_to_overlay <- "Run 7"      # Which source
image_width_um <- 5682            # Width of microscopy image in µm (pixels)
image_height_um <- 5682           # Height of microscopy image in µm (pixels)
point_size_pixels <- 10            # Radius of each point in pixels
output_filename <- "gated_overlay1.bmp"

# === CREATE OVERLAY ===
cat("Creating gated cell overlay for Well:", well_to_overlay, "Source:", source_to_overlay, "\n")

# Filter gated cells
gated_cells <- Object_Table[Gated_PC == TRUE & 
                            Well == well_to_overlay & 
                            Source == source_to_overlay &
                            !is.na(`X.Position.(µm)`)]

cat("Gated cells found:", nrow(gated_cells), "\n")

if (nrow(gated_cells) == 0) {
  stop("No gated cells found for specified well and source")
}

# Create black background matrix (3 channels for RGB)
img <- array(0, dim = c(image_height_um, image_width_um, 3))

# Convert µm coordinates to pixel coordinates (1 µm = 1 pixel)
# Assuming coordinates start at 0,0
gated_cells[, x_pixel := round(`X.Position.(µm)`) + 1]  # +1 for R 1-based indexing
gated_cells[, y_pixel := round(`Y.Position.(µm)`) + 1]

# Filter out-of-bounds coordinates
gated_cells <- gated_cells[x_pixel >= 1 & x_pixel <= image_width_um &
                           y_pixel >= 1 & y_pixel <= image_height_um]

cat("Cells within image bounds:", nrow(gated_cells), "\n")

# Draw red points (RGB: 1, 0, 0)
for (i in 1:nrow(gated_cells)) {
  x <- gated_cells$x_pixel[i]
  y <- gated_cells$y_pixel[i]
  
  # Draw point with specified radius
  for (dx in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
    for (dy in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
      if (dx^2 + dy^2 <= point_size_pixels^2) {  # Circle shape
        px <- x + dx
        py <- y + dy
        if (px >= 1 && px <= image_width_um && py >= 1 && py <= image_height_um) {
          img[py, px, 1] <- 1  # Red
          img[py, px, 2] <- 0  # Green
          img[py, px, 3] <- 0  # Blue 
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

cat("Drawing complete, saving to:", output_filename, "\n")

# Save as BMP
library(png)  # or use bmp() device

# Convert to 0-255 range
img_byte <- img * 255

# Save using png package (then convert) or direct BMP
bmp(filename = output_filename, 
    width = image_width_um, 
    height = image_height_um, 
    units = "px", 
    res = 72)  # Doesn't matter for overlay
par(mar = c(0,0,0,0))
plot(0, type = "n", xlim = c(0, image_width_um), ylim = c(0, image_height_um), 
     xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "")
rasterImage(img, 0, 0, image_width_um, image_height_um)
dev.off()

cat("\n=== OVERLAY COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("File:", output_filename, "\n")
cat("Dimensions:", image_width_um, "x", image_height_um, "pixels (µm)\n")
cat("Gated cells plotted:", nrow(gated_cells), "\n")
cat("Ready for manual overlay on microscopy image\n")
```

```{r Gated-Cell-Visualize-v2}
# === USER SETTINGS ===
well_to_overlay <- "B2"           # Which well to visualize
source_to_overlay <- "Run 7"      # Which source
image_width_um <- 5683            # Width of microscopy image in µm
image_height_um <- 5683           # Height of microscopy image in µm
point_size_pixels <- 6            # Radius of each point in pixels
output_filename <- "gated_overlay.bmp"

# === CREATE OVERLAY ===
cat("Creating gated cell overlay for Well:", well_to_overlay, "Source:", source_to_overlay, "\n")

# Filter gated cells
gated_cells <- Object_Table[
                            Gated_PC == TRUE & 
                            Well == well_to_overlay & 
                            Source == source_to_overlay &
                            !is.na(`X.Position.(µm)`) &
                            !is.na(`Y.Position.(µm)`)]

cat("Gated cells found:", nrow(gated_cells), "\n")

if (nrow(gated_cells) == 0) {
  stop("No gated cells found for specified well and source")
}

# Calculate coordinate ranges for info
x_min <- min(gated_cells$`X.Position.(µm)`)
x_max <- max(gated_cells$`X.Position.(µm)`)
y_min <- min(gated_cells$`Y.Position.(µm)`)
y_max <- max(gated_cells$`Y.Position.(µm)`)

cat("\nCoordinate ranges:\n")
cat("X: [", x_min, ", ", x_max, "] µm\n", sep = "")
cat("Y: [", y_min, ", ", y_max, "] µm\n", sep = "")

# Create black background matrix (3 channels for RGB)
img <- array(0, dim = c(image_height_um, image_width_um, 3))

# Calculate center of canvas
center_x <- round(image_width_um / 2)
center_y <- round(image_height_um / 2)

cat("\nCanvas center at pixel:", center_x, ",", center_y, "\n")
cat("Coordinate (0,0) will map to pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")

# Map coordinates: (0,0) → center of canvas
# x_pixel = x_coordinate + center
# y_pixel = y_coordinate + center
gated_cells[, x_pixel := round(`X.Position.(µm)`) + center_x]
gated_cells[, y_pixel := round(`Y.Position.(µm)`) + center_y]

#test rotations
#gated_cells[, y_pixel := (-1 * round(`X.Position.(µm)`)) + center_x]
#gated_cells[, x_pixel := (-1 * round(`Y.Position.(µm)`)) + center_y]

# Filter out-of-bounds coordinates
in_bounds <- gated_cells[x_pixel >= 1 & x_pixel <= image_width_um &
                         y_pixel >= 1 & y_pixel <= image_height_um]
out_of_bounds <- nrow(gated_cells) - nrow(in_bounds)

cat("Cells within canvas bounds:", nrow(in_bounds), "\n")
if (out_of_bounds > 0) {
  cat("WARNING: ", out_of_bounds, " cells fall outside canvas\n", sep = "")
}

gated_cells <- in_bounds

# Draw red points (RGB: 1, 0, 0)
cat("Drawing points...\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(gated_cells)) {
  x <- gated_cells$x_pixel[i]
  y <- gated_cells$y_pixel[i]
  
  # Draw point with specified radius
  for (dx in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
    for (dy in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
      if (dx^2 + dy^2 <= point_size_pixels^2) {  # Circle shape
        px <- x + dx
        py <- y + dy
        if (px >= 1 && px <= image_width_um && py >= 1 && py <= image_height_um) {
          img[py, px, 1] <- 1  # Red
          img[py, px, 2] <- 0  # Green
          img[py, px, 3] <- 0  # Blue (R+G = Yellow)
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Progress indicator
  if (i %% 100 == 0) cat(".")
}
cat("\n")

cat("Drawing complete, saving to:", output_filename, "\n")

# Save as BMP
bmp(filename = output_filename, 
    width = image_width_um, 
    height = image_height_um, 
    units = "px")
par(mar = c(0,0,0,0))
plot(0, type = "n", xlim = c(0, image_width_um), ylim = c(0, image_height_um), 
     xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", bty = "n")
rasterImage(img, 0, 0, image_width_um, image_height_um)
dev.off()

cat("\n=== OVERLAY COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("File:", output_filename, "\n")
cat("Dimensions:", image_width_um, "x", image_height_um, "pixels (µm)\n")
cat("Center at pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")
cat("Gated cells plotted:", nrow(gated_cells), "\n")
cat("Ready for manual overlay on microscopy image\n")
```

```{r Gated-Cell-Visualize-v3}
# === USER SETTINGS ===
well_to_overlay <- "A12"           # Which well to visualize
source_to_overlay <- "Run 10"      # Which source
image_width_um <- 5683            # Width of microscopy image in µm
image_height_um <- 5683           # Height of microscopy image in µm
point_size_pixels <- 6            # Radius of each point in pixels
output_filename <- "cell_overlay.bmp"

# === CREATE OVERLAY ===
cat("Creating cell overlay for Well:", well_to_overlay, "Source:", source_to_overlay, "\n")

# Filter columns
cells <- Object_Table[
                            Well == well_to_overlay & 
                            Source == source_to_overlay &
                            !is.na(`X.Position.(µm)`) &
                            !is.na(`Y.Position.(µm)`)]

cat("Cells found:", nrow(cells), "\n")

if (nrow(cells) == 0) {
  stop("No cells found for specified well and source")
}

# Calculate coordinate ranges for info
x_min <- min(cells$`X.Position.(µm)`)
x_max <- max(cells$`X.Position.(µm)`)
y_min <- min(cells$`Y.Position.(µm)`)
y_max <- max(cells$`Y.Position.(µm)`)

cat("\nCoordinate ranges:\n")
cat("X: [", x_min, ", ", x_max, "] µm\n", sep = "")
cat("Y: [", y_min, ", ", y_max, "] µm\n", sep = "")

# Create black background matrix (3 channels for RGB)
img <- array(0, dim = c(image_height_um, image_width_um, 3))

# Calculate center of canvas
center_x <- round(image_width_um / 2)
center_y <- round(image_height_um / 2)

cat("\nCanvas center at pixel:", center_x, ",", center_y, "\n")
cat("Coordinate (0,0) will map to pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")

# Map coordinates: (0,0) → center of canvas
# x_pixel = x_coordinate + center
# y_pixel = y_coordinate + center
cells[, x_pixel := round(`X.Position.(µm)`) + center_x]
cells[, y_pixel := round(`Y.Position.(µm)`) + center_y]

#test rotations
#gated_cells[, y_pixel := (-1 * round(`X.Position.(µm)`)) + center_x]
#gated_cells[, x_pixel := (-1 * round(`Y.Position.(µm)`)) + center_y]

# Filter out-of-bounds coordinates
in_bounds <- cells[x_pixel >= 1 & x_pixel <= image_width_um &
                         y_pixel >= 1 & y_pixel <= image_height_um]
out_of_bounds <- nrow(cells) - nrow(in_bounds)

cat("Cells within canvas bounds:", nrow(in_bounds), "\n")
if (out_of_bounds > 0) {
  cat("WARNING: ", out_of_bounds, " cells fall outside canvas\n", sep = "")
}

cells <- in_bounds

# Draw red points (RGB: 1, 0, 0)
cat("Drawing points...\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(cells)) {
  x <- cells$x_pixel[i]
  y <- cells$y_pixel[i]
  
  # Draw point with specified radius
  for (dx in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
    for (dy in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
      if (dx^2 + dy^2 <= point_size_pixels^2) {  # Circle shape
        px <- x + dx
        py <- y + dy
        if (px >= 1 && px <= image_width_um && py >= 1 && py <= image_height_um) {
          
          is_gated <- cells$Gated_PC[i]

if (is_gated) {
  # TRUE → Red
  img[py, px, 1] <- 1
  img[py, px, 2] <- 0
  img[py, px, 3] <- 0
} else {
  # FALSE → Blue
  img[py, px, 1] <- 0
  img[py, px, 2] <- 0
  img[py, px, 3] <- 1
}
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Progress indicator
  if (i %% 100 == 0) cat(".")
}
cat("\n")

cat("Drawing complete, saving to:", output_filename, "\n")

# Save as BMP
bmp(filename = output_filename, 
    width = image_width_um, 
    height = image_height_um, 
    units = "px")
par(mar = c(0,0,0,0))
plot(0, type = "n", xlim = c(0, image_width_um), ylim = c(0, image_height_um), 
     xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", bty = "n")
rasterImage(img, 0, 0, image_width_um, image_height_um)
dev.off()

cat("\n=== OVERLAY COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("File:", output_filename, "\n")
cat("Dimensions:", image_width_um, "x", image_height_um, "pixels (µm)\n")
cat("Center at pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")
cat("Total cells plotted:", nrow(cells), "\n")
cat("Gated (TRUE):", sum(cells$Gated_PC == TRUE), "\n")
cat("Ungated (FALSE):", sum(cells$Gated_PC == FALSE), "\n")
cat("Ready for manual overlay on microscopy image\n")
```

```{r affine-combo-WORKS}
# === STEP 1: AFFINE TRANSFORMATION ===
library(MASS)

test_data <- data.table(
  mic_x = c(785, 1243, 841, 1255, 1483, 1549, 1805, 1959, 2862, 2688, 2914, 4369, 3422, 2981, 2920),
  mic_y = c(2763, 2770, 2498, 2587, 3199, 1418, 1714, 2019, 913, 1317, 1900, 3405, 3650, 2671, 2684),
  real_x = c(903, 1337, 957, 1349, 1563, 1627, 1867, 2013, 2868, 2703, 2917, 4320, 3398, 2981, 2922),
  real_y = c(2759, 2767, 2509, 2594, 3170, 1488, 1768, 2059, 1010, 1393, 1943, 3369, 3598, 2671, 2682)
)

test_data[, c("mic_x", "mic_y") := .(mic_x - 2841, mic_y - 2841)]

# Fit affine transformation
affine_x <- lm(real_x ~ mic_x + mic_y, data = test_data)
affine_y <- lm(real_y ~ mic_x + mic_y, data = test_data)

cat("=== AFFINE TRANSFORMATION ===\n")
cat("X = ", round(coef(affine_x)[1], 2), " + ", 
    round(coef(affine_x)[2], 6), "·mic_x + ", 
    round(coef(affine_x)[3], 6), "·mic_y\n", sep = "")
cat("Y = ", round(coef(affine_y)[1], 2), " + ", 
    round(coef(affine_y)[2], 6), "·mic_x + ", 
    round(coef(affine_y)[3], 6), "·mic_y\n\n", sep = "")

# Apply affine to get intermediate positions
test_data[, affine_x := predict(affine_x, .SD)]
test_data[, affine_y := predict(affine_y, .SD)]

# Calculate residual errors after affine
test_data[, affine_error := sqrt((affine_x - real_x)^2 + (affine_y - real_y)^2)]

cat("Affine-only errors:\n")
print(test_data[, .(mic_x, mic_y, affine_error)])
cat("\nMean error:", round(mean(test_data$affine_error), 1), "pixels\n")
cat("Max error:", round(max(test_data$affine_error), 1), "pixels\n\n")

# === STEP 2: RADIAL CORRECTION ON RESIDUALS ===
# If affine errors still show radial pattern, fit radial correction

# Find center of affine-corrected space (mean of predictions)
center_x <- mean(test_data$affine_x)
center_y <- mean(test_data$affine_y)

cat("Center of affine-corrected space: (", round(center_x), ", ", round(center_y), ")\n\n", sep = "")

# Calculate radial distances in affine-corrected space
test_data[, r_affine := sqrt((affine_x - center_x)^2 + (affine_y - center_y)^2)]
test_data[, r_real := sqrt((real_x - center_x)^2 + (real_y - center_y)^2)]
test_data[, scale_needed := r_real / r_affine]
test_data[, delta := scale_needed - 1]

# Fit radial distortion on top of affine
radial_model <- lm(delta ~ 0 + I(r_affine^2) + I(r_affine^4), data = test_data)
k1 <- coef(radial_model)[1]
k2 <- coef(radial_model)[2]

cat("=== RADIAL DISTORTION (on top of affine) ===\n")
cat("scale(r) = 1 +", format(k1, scientific = TRUE), "· r² +",
    format(k2, scientific = TRUE), "· r⁴\n")
cat("R-squared:", round(summary(radial_model)$r.squared, 4), "\n\n")

# === STEP 3: COMBINED PREDICTION ===
cat("=== COMBINED (AFFINE + RADIAL) PREDICTIONS ===\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(test_data)) {
  # Step 1: Apply affine
  affine_pred_x <- predict(affine_x, test_data[i])
  affine_pred_y <- predict(affine_y, test_data[i])
  
  # Step 2: Apply radial correction
  r <- sqrt((affine_pred_x - center_x)^2 + (affine_pred_y - center_y)^2)
  scale <- 1 + k1 * r^2 + k2 * r^4
  
  final_x <- round((affine_pred_x - center_x) * scale + center_x)
  final_y <- round((affine_pred_y - center_y) * scale + center_y)
  
  error <- sqrt((final_x - test_data$real_x[i])^2 + 
                (final_y - test_data$real_y[i])^2)
  
  cat("Cell", i, ": Predicted (", final_x, ", ", final_y, 
      ") | Actual (", test_data$real_x[i], ", ", test_data$real_y[i], 
      ") | Error:", round(error, 1), "px\n", sep = "")
}

cat("\n=== TO USE THIS MODEL ===\n")
cat("1. Apply affine:\n")
cat("   x_temp = ", round(coef(affine_x)[1], 2), " + ", 
    round(coef(affine_x)[2], 6), "·mic_x + ", 
    round(coef(affine_x)[3], 6), "·mic_y\n", sep = "")
cat("   y_temp = ", round(coef(affine_y)[1], 2), " + ", 
    round(coef(affine_y)[2], 6), "·mic_x + ", 
    round(coef(affine_y)[3], 6), "·mic_y\n", sep = "")
cat("\n2. Apply radial:\n")
cat("   r = sqrt((x_temp - ", round(center_x), ")² + (y_temp - ", round(center_y), ")²)\n", sep = "")
cat("   scale = 1 +", format(k1, scientific = TRUE), "·r² +", format(k2, scientific = TRUE), "·r⁴\n")
cat("   final_x = (x_temp - ", round(center_x), ") × scale + ", round(center_x), "\n", sep = "")
cat("   final_y = (y_temp - ", round(center_y), ") × scale + ", round(center_y), "\n", sep = "")
```

```{r Affine-Radial-Distortion-correction}
# === APPLY TRANSFORMATION TO COORDINATES ===

# Transformation parameters (from affine script)
affine_x_intercept <- 2853.25
affine_x_coef_x <- 0.949288
affine_x_coef_y <- 0.002611

affine_y_intercept <- 2833.28
affine_y_coef_x <- 7.9e-05
affine_y_coef_y <- 0.945319

radial_center_x <- 2248
radial_center_y <- 2385
k1 <- -2.805967e-09
k2 <- 7.814928e-16

# Apply transformation to gated_cells
gated_cells[, `:=`(
  # Step 1: Affine transformation
  x_temp = affine_x_intercept + affine_x_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_x_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`,
  y_temp = affine_y_intercept + affine_y_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_y_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`
)]

# Step 2: Radial correction
gated_cells[, `:=`(
  r = sqrt((x_temp - radial_center_x)^2 + (y_temp - radial_center_y)^2)
)]

gated_cells[, `:=`(
  scale = 1 + k1 * r^2 + k2 * r^4
)]

gated_cells[, `:=`(
  x_pixel = round((x_temp - radial_center_x) * scale + radial_center_x),
  y_pixel = round((y_temp - radial_center_y) * scale + radial_center_y)
)]

# Clean up temporary columns
gated_cells[, c("x_temp", "y_temp", "r", "scale") := NULL]

# Now x_pixel and y_pixel are corrected and ready for overlay
cat("Transformation applied to", nrow(gated_cells), "cells\n")
cat("Coordinate range - X: [", min(gated_cells$x_pixel), ", ", max(gated_cells$x_pixel), "]\n", sep = "")
cat("Coordinate range - Y: [", min(gated_cells$y_pixel), ", ", max(gated_cells$y_pixel), "]\n", sep = "")
```

```{r Cell-Visualize-v1}
# === USER SETTINGS ===
well_to_overlay <- "A4"           # Which well to visualize
source_to_overlay <- "Run 9"      # Which source
image_width_um <- 5683            # Width of microscopy image in µm
image_height_um <- 5683           # Height of microscopy image in µm
point_size_pixels <- 6            # Radius of each point in pixels
output_filename <- "cell_overlay.bmp"

# === CREATE OVERLAY ===
cat("Creating cell overlay for Well:", well_to_overlay, "Source:", source_to_overlay, "\n")

# Filter columns
cells <- Object_Table[
                            Well == well_to_overlay & 
                            Source == source_to_overlay &
                            !is.na(`X.Position.(µm)`) &
                            !is.na(`Y.Position.(µm)`)]

# ==========================================
# ========== Distortion Correction =========
# ==========================================

# === APPLY TRANSFORMATION TO COORDINATES ===

# Transformation parameters (from affine-combo script)
affine_x_intercept <- 2853.25
affine_x_coef_x <- 0.949288
affine_x_coef_y <- 0.002611

affine_y_intercept <- 2833.28
affine_y_coef_x <- 7.9e-05
affine_y_coef_y <- 0.945319

radial_center_x <- 2248
radial_center_y <- 2385
k1 <- -2.805967e-09
k2 <- 7.814928e-16

# Apply transformation to cells
cells[, `:=`(
  # Step 1: Affine transformation
  x_temp = affine_x_intercept + affine_x_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_x_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`,
  y_temp = affine_y_intercept + affine_y_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_y_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`
)]

# Step 2: Radial correction
cells[, `:=`(
  r = sqrt((x_temp - radial_center_x)^2 + (y_temp - radial_center_y)^2)
)]

cells[, `:=`(
  scale = 1 + k1 * r^2 + k2 * r^4
)]

cells[, `:=`(
  x_pixel = round((x_temp - radial_center_x) * scale + radial_center_x),
  y_pixel = round((y_temp - radial_center_y) * scale + radial_center_y)
)]

# Clean up temporary columns
cells[, c("x_temp", "y_temp", "r", "scale") := NULL]

# Now x_pixel and y_pixel are corrected and ready for overlay
cat("Transformation applied to", nrow(cells), "cells\n")
cat("Coordinate range - X: [", min(cells$x_pixel), ", ", max(cells$x_pixel), "]\n", sep = "")
cat("Coordinate range - Y: [", min(cells$y_pixel), ", ", max(cells$y_pixel), "]\n", sep = "")

cat("Cells found:", nrow(cells), "\n")

if (nrow(cells) == 0) {
  stop("No cells found for specified well and source")
}


# Create black background matrix (3 channels for RGB)
img <- array(0, dim = c(image_height_um, image_width_um, 3))

# Calculate center of canvas
center_x <- round(image_width_um / 2)
center_y <- round(image_height_um / 2)

cat("\nCanvas center at pixel:", center_x, ",", center_y, "\n")
cat("Coordinate (0,0) will map to pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")

# Map coordinates: (0,0) → center of canvas
# x_pixel = x_coordinate + center
# y_pixel = y_coordinate + center
#cells[, x_pixel := round(`X.Position.(µm)`) + center_x]
#cells[, y_pixel := round(`Y.Position.(µm)`) + center_y]




# Draw red points (RGB: 1, 0, 0)
cat("Drawing points...\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(cells)) {
  x <- cells$x_pixel[i]
  y <- cells$y_pixel[i]
  
  # Draw point with specified radius
  for (dx in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
    for (dy in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
      if (dx^2 + dy^2 <= point_size_pixels^2) {  # Circle shape
        px <- x + dx
        py <- y + dy
        if (px >= 1 && px <= image_width_um && py >= 1 && py <= image_height_um) {
  img[py, px, 1] <- 1
  img[py, px, 2] <- 0
  img[py, px, 3] <- 0

        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Progress indicator
  if (i %% 100 == 0) cat(".")
}
cat("\n")

cat("Drawing complete, saving to:", output_filename, "\n")

# Save as BMP
bmp(filename = output_filename, 
    width = image_width_um, 
    height = image_height_um, 
    units = "px")
par(mar = c(0,0,0,0))
plot(0, type = "n", xlim = c(0, image_width_um), ylim = c(0, image_height_um), 
     xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", bty = "n")
rasterImage(img, 0, 0, image_width_um, image_height_um)
dev.off()

cat("\n=== OVERLAY COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("File:", output_filename, "\n")
cat("Dimensions:", image_width_um, "x", image_height_um, "pixels (µm)\n")
cat("Center at pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")
cat("Total cells plotted:", nrow(cells), "\n")
cat("Ready for manual overlay on microscopy image\n")
```

```{r Cell-Visualize-v2}
# === USER SETTINGS ===
well_to_overlay <- "A3"           # Which well to visualize
source_to_overlay <- "Run 9"      # Which source
image_width_um <- 5683            # Width of microscopy image in µm
image_height_um <- 5683           # Height of microscopy image in µm
point_size_pixels <- 6            # Radius of each point in pixels
output_filename <- "cell_overlay.bmp"

# === COLOR SCHEME ===
# Define colors for each quadrant (RGB values 0-1)
colors <- list(
  A = c(1, 0, 0),      # Red
  B = c(0, 1, 0),      # Green
  C = c(0, 0, 1),      # Blue
  D = c(1, 1, 0),      # Yellow
  default = c(1, 1, 1) # White
)

# === CREATE OVERLAY ===
cat("Creating cell overlay for Well:", well_to_overlay, "Source:", source_to_overlay, "\n")

# Filter columns
cells <- Object_Table[
                            Well == well_to_overlay & 
                            Source == source_to_overlay &
                            !is.na(`X.Position.(µm)`) &
                            !is.na(`Y.Position.(µm)`)]

# ==========================================
# ========== Distortion Correction =========
# ==========================================

# === APPLY TRANSFORMATION TO COORDINATES ===

# Transformation parameters (from affine-combo script)
affine_x_intercept <- 2853.25
affine_x_coef_x <- 0.949288
affine_x_coef_y <- 0.002611

affine_y_intercept <- 2833.28
affine_y_coef_x <- 7.9e-05
affine_y_coef_y <- 0.945319

radial_center_x <- 2248
radial_center_y <- 2385
k1 <- -2.805967e-09
k2 <- 7.814928e-16

# Apply transformation to cells
cells[, `:=`(
  # Step 1: Affine transformation
  x_temp = affine_x_intercept + affine_x_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_x_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`,
  y_temp = affine_y_intercept + affine_y_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_y_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`
)]

# Step 2: Radial correction
cells[, `:=`(
  r = sqrt((x_temp - radial_center_x)^2 + (y_temp - radial_center_y)^2)
)]

cells[, `:=`(
  scale = 1 + k1 * r^2 + k2 * r^4
)]

cells[, `:=`(
  x_pixel = round((x_temp - radial_center_x) * scale + radial_center_x),
  y_pixel = round((y_temp - radial_center_y) * scale + radial_center_y)
)]

# Clean up temporary columns
cells[, c("x_temp", "y_temp", "r", "scale") := NULL]

# === ASSIGN COLORS BASED ON QUADRANT ===
cells[, color_r := colors$default[1]]
cells[, color_g := colors$default[2]]
cells[, color_b := colors$default[3]]

# Check for each quadrant column and assign color
if ("PC.Quadrant.A" %in% names(cells)) {
  cells[PC.Quadrant.A == TRUE, `:=`(color_r = colors$A[1], color_g = colors$A[2], color_b = colors$A[3])]
}
if ("PC.Quadrant.B" %in% names(cells)) {
  cells[PC.Quadrant.B == TRUE, `:=`(color_r = colors$B[1], color_g = colors$B[2], color_b = colors$B[3])]
}
if ("PC.Quadrant.C" %in% names(cells)) {
  cells[PC.Quadrant.C == TRUE, `:=`(color_r = colors$C[1], color_g = colors$C[2], color_b = colors$C[3])]
}
if ("PC.Quadrant.D" %in% names(cells)) {
  cells[PC.Quadrant.D == TRUE, `:=`(color_r = colors$D[1], color_g = colors$D[2], color_b = colors$D[3])]
}

# Now x_pixel and y_pixel are corrected and ready for overlay
cat("Transformation applied to", nrow(cells), "cells\n")
cat("Coordinate range - X: [", min(cells$x_pixel), ", ", max(cells$x_pixel), "]\n", sep = "")
cat("Coordinate range - Y: [", min(cells$y_pixel), ", ", max(cells$y_pixel), "]\n", sep = "")

cat("Cells found:", nrow(cells), "\n")

if (nrow(cells) == 0) {
  stop("No cells found for specified well and source")
}

# Create black background matrix (3 channels for RGB)
img <- array(0, dim = c(image_height_um, image_width_um, 3))

# Calculate center of canvas
center_x <- round(image_width_um / 2)
center_y <- round(image_height_um / 2)

cat("\nCanvas center at pixel:", center_x, ",", center_y, "\n")
cat("Coordinate (0,0) will map to pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")

# Draw colored points
cat("Drawing points...\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(cells)) {
  x <- cells$x_pixel[i]
  y <- cells$y_pixel[i]
  
  # Get color for this cell
  r_val <- cells$color_r[i]
  g_val <- cells$color_g[i]
  b_val <- cells$color_b[i]
  
  # Draw point with specified radius
  for (dx in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
    for (dy in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
      if (dx^2 + dy^2 <= point_size_pixels^2) {  # Circle shape
        px <- x + dx
        py <- y + dy
        if (px >= 1 && px <= image_width_um && py >= 1 && py <= image_height_um) {
          img[py, px, 1] <- r_val
          img[py, px, 2] <- g_val
          img[py, px, 3] <- b_val
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # Progress indicator
  if (i %% 100 == 0) cat(".")
}
cat("\n")

cat("Drawing complete, saving to:", output_filename, "\n")

# Save as BMP
bmp(filename = output_filename, 
    width = image_width_um, 
    height = image_height_um, 
    units = "px")
par(mar = c(0,0,0,0))
plot(0, type = "n", xlim = c(0, image_width_um), ylim = c(0, image_height_um), 
     xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", bty = "n")
rasterImage(img, 0, 0, image_width_um, image_height_um)
dev.off()

cat("\n=== OVERLAY COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("File:", output_filename, "\n")
cat("Dimensions:", image_width_um, "x", image_height_um, "pixels (µm)\n")
cat("Center at pixel (", center_x, ",", center_y, ")\n", sep = "")
cat("Total cells plotted:", nrow(cells), "\n")
cat("Color scheme: A=Red, B=Green, C=Blue, D=Yellow, Other=White\n")
cat("Ready for manual overlay on microscopy image\n")
```

```{r Cell-Visualize-with-threshold}
# === USER SETTINGS ===
well_to_overlay <- "A2"
source_to_overlay <- "Run 9"
image_width_um <- 5683
image_height_um <- 5683
point_size_pixels <- 6
output_filename <- "cell_overlay_threshold.bmp"

# Threshold column name
threshold_col <- "10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity"

# === COLOR SCHEME ===
colors <- list(
  "TRUE" = c(1, 0, 0),    # Red for above threshold
  "FALSE" = c(0, 0, 1)    # Blue for below threshold
)

# === CREATE OVERLAY ===
cat("Creating cell overlay for Well:", well_to_overlay, "Source:", source_to_overlay, "\n")

# Filter columns
cells <- Object_Table[Well == well_to_overlay & 
                      Source == source_to_overlay &
                      !is.na(`X.Position.(µm)`) &
                      !is.na(`Y.Position.(µm)`)]

# ==========================================
# ========== Distortion Correction =========
# ==========================================

# Transformation parameters
affine_x_intercept <- 2853.25
affine_x_coef_x <- 0.949288
affine_x_coef_y <- 0.002611

affine_y_intercept <- 2833.28
affine_y_coef_x <- 7.9e-05
affine_y_coef_y <- 0.945319

radial_center_x <- 2248
radial_center_y <- 2385
k1 <- -2.805967e-09
k2 <- 7.814928e-16

# Apply transformation
cells[, `:=`(
  x_temp = affine_x_intercept + affine_x_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_x_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`,
  y_temp = affine_y_intercept + affine_y_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_y_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`
)]

cells[, r := sqrt((x_temp - radial_center_x)^2 + (y_temp - radial_center_y)^2)]
cells[, scale := 1 + k1 * r^2 + k2 * r^4]

cells[, `:=`(
  x_pixel = round((x_temp - radial_center_x) * scale + radial_center_x),
  y_pixel = round((y_temp - radial_center_y) * scale + radial_center_y)
)]

cells[, c("x_temp", "y_temp", "r", "scale") := NULL]

# === ASSIGN COLORS BASED ON THRESHOLD ===
cells[, color_r := colors$"FALSE"[1]]
cells[, color_g := colors$"FALSE"[2]]
cells[, color_b := colors$"FALSE"[3]]

if (threshold_col %in% names(cells)) {
  cells[get(threshold_col) == TRUE, `:=`(
    color_r = colors$"TRUE"[1],
    color_g = colors$"TRUE"[2],
    color_b = colors$"TRUE"[3]
  )]
}

cat("Transformation applied to", nrow(cells), "cells\n")
cat("Cells above threshold:", sum(cells[[threshold_col]], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")

if (nrow(cells) == 0) {
  stop("No cells found for specified well and source")
}

# Create black background matrix
img <- array(0, dim = c(image_height_um, image_width_um, 3))

center_x <- round(image_width_um / 2)
center_y <- round(image_height_um / 2)

# Draw colored points
cat("Drawing points...\n")
for (i in 1:nrow(cells)) {
  x <- cells$x_pixel[i]
  y <- cells$y_pixel[i]
  
  r_val <- cells$color_r[i]
  g_val <- cells$color_g[i]
  b_val <- cells$color_b[i]
  
  for (dx in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
    for (dy in -point_size_pixels:point_size_pixels) {
      if (dx^2 + dy^2 <= point_size_pixels^2) {
        px <- x + dx
        py <- y + dy
        if (px >= 1 && px <= image_width_um && py >= 1 && py <= image_height_um) {
          img[py, px, 1] <- r_val
          img[py, px, 2] <- g_val
          img[py, px, 3] <- b_val
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  if (i %% 100 == 0) cat(".")
}
cat("\n")

# Save as BMP
bmp(filename = output_filename, 
    width = image_width_um, 
    height = image_height_um, 
    units = "px")
par(mar = c(0,0,0,0))
plot(0, type = "n", xlim = c(0, image_width_um), ylim = c(0, image_height_um), 
     xaxs = "i", yaxs = "i", xaxt = "n", yaxt = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", bty = "n")
rasterImage(img, 0, 0, image_width_um, image_height_um)
dev.off()

cat("\n=== OVERLAY COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("File:", output_filename, "\n")
cat("Color scheme: Red = above threshold, Blue = below threshold\n")
```

```{r fiji-crop-tool-step1}
# === USER SETTINGS ===
well_to_overlay <- "A3"
source_to_overlay <- "Run 9"
quadrants_to_extract <- c("D")  # Which quadrants to include
output_coords_file <- "crop_coordinates-B.csv"
crop_size <- 30  # Size of crop box

# Filter and transform cells (using your existing transformation code)
cells <- Object_Table[
  Well == well_to_overlay & 
  Source == source_to_overlay &
  !is.na(`X.Position.(µm)`) &
  !is.na(`Y.Position.(µm)`)]

# Apply transformations (your existing code)
affine_x_intercept <- 2853.25
affine_x_coef_x <- 0.949288
affine_x_coef_y <- 0.002611
affine_y_intercept <- 2833.28
affine_y_coef_x <- 7.9e-05
affine_y_coef_y <- 0.945319
radial_center_x <- 2248
radial_center_y <- 2385
k1 <- -2.805967e-09
k2 <- 7.814928e-16

cells[, `:=`(
  x_temp = affine_x_intercept + affine_x_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_x_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`,
  y_temp = affine_y_intercept + affine_y_coef_x * `X.Position.(µm)` + affine_y_coef_y * `Y.Position.(µm)`
)]

cells[, r := sqrt((x_temp - radial_center_x)^2 + (y_temp - radial_center_y)^2)]
cells[, scale := 1 + k1 * r^2 + k2 * r^4]
cells[, `:=`(
  x_pixel = round((x_temp - radial_center_x) * scale + radial_center_x),
  y_pixel = round((y_temp - radial_center_y) * scale + radial_center_y)
)]

# Filter for quadrant-positive cells
cells[, is_target := FALSE]
for (quad in quadrants_to_extract) {
  col_name <- paste0("PC.Quadrant.", quad)
  if (col_name %in% names(cells)) {
    cells[get(col_name) == TRUE, is_target := TRUE]
  }
}

target_cells <- cells[is_target == TRUE]

cat("Total cells:", nrow(cells), "\n")
cat("Target cells for cropping:", nrow(target_cells), "\n")

# Export coordinates
coords_export <- target_cells[, .(x_pixel, y_pixel)]
write.csv(coords_export, output_coords_file, row.names = FALSE)

cat("Coordinates exported to:", output_coords_file, "\n")
cat("Ready for FIJI macro processing\n")
```

```{r range}
range(Object_Table$`X.Position.(µm)`)
range(Object_Table$`Y.Position.(µm)`)
```

```{r find_cell}
find_cell <- function(x, y, well = "A3", source = "Run 7") {
  center_x <- 2841.5
  center_y <- 2841.5
  
  search_data <- Object_Table[Well == well & Source == source]
  search_data[, x_pixel := round(`X.Position.(µm)`) + center_x]
  search_data[, y_pixel := round(`Y.Position.(µm)`) + center_y]
  search_data[, distance := sqrt((x_pixel - x)^2 + (y_pixel - y)^2)]
  
  closest <- search_data[which.min(distance)]
  return(closest)
}

# Use it:
cell <- find_cell(1869, 2674)
print(t(cell))
```

```{r Violin-plot-multisource-WIP}
y_var <- "Area"
plot_title <- paste0("Distribution of ",  y_var)
df <- Object_Norm[, .(Condition, y = get(y_var), Source)]

# filter
df <- df[Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only\n+ PMA")]

# Convert Column to factor for plotting
#df[, Column := factor(Column, levels = c("1", "3", "2", "4", "5"),
 #                             labels = c("No Stain", "Cells Only", "+ PMA", "Polyester Colors\nHeat Killed", "Polyester Colors\n+ UV"))]

# === 3. Generate colors for DATASET (not Column) ===
unique_datasets <- unique(df$Source)

# Define manual colors for datasets if desired
dataset_colors <- c(
  "Experiment 1" = "lightblue",
  "Experiment 2" = "lightcoral"
)

# Get predefined colors
active_dataset_colors <- dataset_colors[names(dataset_colors) %in% unique_datasets]

# Auto-generate for missing datasets
missing_datasets <- setdiff(unique_datasets, names(dataset_colors))
if (length(missing_datasets) > 0) {
  cat("Generating colors for datasets:", paste(missing_datasets, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  new_colors <- brewer.pal(max(3, length(missing_datasets)), "Set1")[1:length(missing_datasets)]
  names(new_colors) <- missing_datasets
  active_dataset_colors <- c(active_dataset_colors, new_colors)
}

# Ensure colors are in same order as unique_datasets
active_dataset_colors <- active_dataset_colors[as.character(unique_datasets)]

# Basic violin plot
p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Condition, y = y, fill = Source)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6, scale = "width") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 1.5, color = "black",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = active_dataset_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Condition",
    y = y_var,
    fill = "Source",
    title = plot_title
  )

ggsave("violin-normArea-run10.png", plot = p, width = 8, height = 6)

print(p)
```

```{r Violin-plot-2conditions-BEST}
## -----------------------------
## User options
## -----------------------------
use_scatter_gate <- FALSE
use_PC_gate      <- FALSE
source_to_use    <- "Run 10"

## -----------------------------
## Start from Object_Table or Object_Norm 
## -----------------------------
tdf <- copy(Object_Norm)

## Filter by Source
tdf <- tdf[Source == source_to_use]

## Apply gates cumulatively
if (use_PC_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[Gated_PC == TRUE]
}

if (use_scatter_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[Scatter.Gate == TRUE]
}

## -----------------------------
## Define measures and conditions
## -----------------------------
measures <- c(
  #"Area",
  #"Form.Factor",
  #"Smoothness",
  #"Aspect.Ratio"
  "Bright.Field.Mean.Intensity", 
  "Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity",
  "DAPI.Mean.Intensity",
  "DAPI.Integrated.Intensity",
  "MPO.Mean.Intensity",
  "MPO.Integrated.Intensity"
)

conditions_to_plot <- c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA")

## -----------------------------
## Filter and prepare data
## -----------------------------
df <- tdf[Condition %in% conditions_to_plot]

## Convert Condition to factor with clean labels
df[, Condition := factor(
  Condition,
  levels = c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA"),
  labels = c("- PMA", "+ PMA")
)]

## -----------------------------
## Reshape to long format
## -----------------------------
df_long <- melt(
  df,
  id.vars = "Condition",
  measure.vars = measures,
  variable.name = "Measure",
  value.name = "Value"
)

df_long[, Measure := factor(
  Measure,
  levels = measures,
  labels = gsub("\\.", " ", measures)
)]


## -----------------------------
## Plot settings
## -----------------------------
condition_colors <- c(
  "- PMA" = "royalblue",
  "+ PMA" = "goldenrod"
)

plot_title <- paste(
  "Distribution of Measures by Condition",
  paste("MPO Mask", source_to_use),
  sep = "\n"
)

## -----------------------------
## Violin plot
## -----------------------------
p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Measure, y = Value, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_violin(
    trim = FALSE,
    alpha = 0.6,
    scale = "width",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.92)
  ) +
  stat_summary(
    fun = median,
    geom = "point",
    size = 1.5,
    color = "black",
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 18),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20),
     legend.position = "top",
    plot.title   = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    fill = "Condition",
    title = plot_title
  )

## -----------------------------
## Save + display
## -----------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = paste0("violin-Zmeas3", gsub(" ", "_", source_to_use), ".png"),
  plot = p,
  width = 10,
  height = 6
)

print(p)

```

```{r Violin-plot-2conditions-with-sources}
use_scatter_gate <- FALSE 
use_PC_gate <- FALSE
runs_to_plot <- c("Run 10")

tdf <- Object_Table[Source %in% runs_to_plot]

if (use_PC_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[Gated_PC == TRUE]
}

if (use_scatter_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[in_gate == TRUE]
}

# Define measures and conditions
measures <- c("Area", "Form.Factor", "Smoothness", "Aspect.Ratio", "DAPI.Mean.Intensity", "DAPI.Integrated.Intensity", "MPO.Mean.Intensity")
conditions_to_plot <- c("Cells Only", "Cells Only\n+ PMA\n4 Hours")  # "Cells Only" And "+ PMA" 

# Filter and prepare data
df <- tdf[Condition %in% conditions_to_plot]

# Convert Column to factor with labels
df[, Condition := factor(Condition, levels = c("Cells Only", "Cells Only\n+ PMA\n4 Hours"),
                      labels = c("Cells Only", "+ PMA"))]

# Reshape data from wide to long format
df_long <- melt(df, 
                id.vars = c("Condition"),
                measure.vars = measures,
                variable.name = "Measure",
                value.name = "Value")

# Create cleaner measure labels
df_long[, Measure := factor(Measure, 
                            levels = measures
                            )]

# Scale it
df_long[, Value := Value / max(Value, na.rm = TRUE), by = Measure]

# Define colors for conditions (not datasets)
condition_colors <- c(
  "Cells Only" = "aquamarine3",
  "+ PMA" = "orangered2"
)

plot_title <- "Distribution of Measures by Condition"

# Create violin plot
p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Measure, y = Value, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6, scale = "width", position = position_dodge(width = 0.92)) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", size = 1.5, color = "black",
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Value",
    fill = "Condition",
    title = plot_title
  )

ggsave("violin-plot-run10.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 6)
print(p)
```

```{r Obj-lvl-histogram}
p <- ggplot(Object_Table[Condition %in% c("Cells Only No Stain + PMA","Cells Only + PMA","Cells Only") & Source == "Run 9"],
       aes(x = CitH3.Integrated.Intensity, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.4,
                 position = "identity",
                 bins = 100) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cells Only No Stain + PMA"="red", "Cells Only + PMA"="blue", "Cells Only"="green")) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = "CitH3 Integrated Intensity (log10)") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("Run9_histo-CitH3.Intgr.I-1.png", plot = p, width = 7, height = 4)
plot(p)

```

```{r Obj-lvl-proportion-histo}
p <- ggplot(Object_Table[Column %in% c(1,2, 3)],
       aes(x = Area, fill = factor(Column))) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count / sum(count)),
                   group = factor(Column),
                   fill = factor(Column)),
               alpha = 0.4,
               position = "identity",
               bins = 100) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("1"="red", "2" = "blue", "3" = "green")) +
  ylab("Proportion") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave("histo-test2.png", plot = p, width = 4, height = 4)
plot(p)

```

```{r diff-density-rd2}
library(terra)

# A_pts and B_pts are SpatVector
# r is the SpatRaster grid
#r <- rast(A_pts, resolution = c(5,5))   
r <- rast(ext(A_pts), nrows = 1750, ncols = 1750)           #These control how many pixels the density maps have.


rA <- rasterize(A_pts, r, field = 1, fun = "sum", background = 0)
rB <- rasterize(B_pts, r, field = 1, fun = "sum", background = 0)

# radius controls smoothing (acts like point size)
radius <- 11      # try 10–40 this controls how wide the density blur is (like point size).
sigma  <- radius / 3

# Create gaussian kernel
x <- -radius:radius
k <- exp(-(x^2)/(2*sigma^2))
kernel <- outer(k, k)
kernel <- kernel / sum(kernel)    # normalize

A_den <- focal(rA, w = kernel, fun = "sum", na.policy = "omit", filename = "")
B_den <- focal(rB, w = kernel, fun = "sum", na.policy = "omit", filename = "")

# Normalize B to 0–1 for thresholding
B_max <- global(B_den, "max", na.rm = TRUE)[[1]]
B_norm <- B_den / B_max

# Threshold: areas with density > t will mask A
t <- 0.06    # adjust for stronger/weaker masking, this controls how aggressively B punches holes in A, higher number is weaker 0-1

mask_inv <- B_norm < t   # TRUE = keep A, FALSE = hole
mask_inv <- mask_inv * 1 # convert to numeric 0/1

A_masked <- A_den * mask_inv

A_df_r <- as.data.frame(A_masked, xy = TRUE)
colnames(A_df_r) <- c("x", "y", "A")

B_df_r <- as.data.frame(B_den, xy = TRUE)
colnames(B_df_r) <- c("x", "y", "B")

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = A_df_r, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = A)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D", na.value = NA) +

  geom_raster(data = B_df_r, aes(x = x, y = y, alpha = B), fill = "green") +
  scale_alpha(range = c(0, 0.5)) +                 #This controls how transparent B appears in the final image.

  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal()
print(p)
ggsave("density-difference-v2.png", width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```

```{r detach terra}
detach("package:terra", unload = TRUE, character.only = TRUE)
search()
```

```{r Obj-lvl-pairwise}
# --- 1. Prepare a clean copy of the data ---
dt_plot <- copy(Object_Table)

# Keep only the conditions you want
dt_plot <- dt_plot[Condition %in% c(
                                    "Cells Only", 
                                    "Cells Only\n+ PMA"
                                    )]

# Keep only source desired
dt_plot <- dt_plot[Source %in% c(
                                  "Run 9"
                                    )]

dt_plot <- dt_plot %>%
          mutate(color_group = if_else(Thresholded_PC1, "PCA_Threshold", Condition))

# Ensure Condition is a factor for coloring
dt_plot[, Condition := factor(Condition)]

# Ensure numeric columns are numeric
num_cols <- c("Area", "Form.Factor", "Smoothness", "Aspect.Ratio", "DAPI.Mean.Intensity", "MPO.Mean.Intensity")
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 2. Define plotting functions ---

# Diagonal: overlaid proportion histograms
diag_hist <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count / sum(count))),
                   alpha = 0.3, position = "identity", bins = 50, color = NA) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("PCA_Threshold" = "green", "Cells Only" = "black", "Cells Only\n+ PMA" = "blue")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ylab("Proportion")
}

# Off-diagonal: scatterplots, colored by condition
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("PCA_Threshold" = "green", "Cells Only" = "black", "Cells Only\n+ PMA" = "blue")) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# --- 3. Make the pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Condition, fill = Condition),
             upper = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_hist))

# --- Add theme for font sizes ---
p <- p + theme(
  # Axis titles (variable names on edges)
  axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
  
  # Axis tick labels (numbers)
  axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
  
  # Strip text (variable labels at top/side)
  strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
  
  # Legend text
  legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 16)
)

# --- 4. Save and display ---
ggsave("pairwise-scatterplot4.png", plot = p, width = 16, height = 16)
#print(p)

```

```{r Obj-lvl-pairwise-v3-gates}
# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- "Run 10"  # Change this

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c("Cells Only", "Cells Only + PMA") &
                        !is.na(Gated_PC)]

# Create labels and groups
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == "Cells Only", "- PMA", "+ PMA")]
dt_plot[, Group := interaction(Condition_Label, 
                               ifelse(Gated_PC, "Gated", "Ungated"),
                               sep = " ")]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c("Area", "Form.Factor", "Smoothness", "Aspect.Ratio", 
                     "Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity", "DAPI.Integrated.Intensity", "MPO.Integrated.Intensity")
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
group_colors <- c(
  "- PMA Ungated" = "#1f78b4",   
  "- PMA Gated"   = "#081d58",   
  "+ PMA Ungated" = "#ff7f00",   
  "+ PMA Gated"   = "red"    
)
 
# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +  # thicker line + fill
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: scatterplots
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Group), alpha = 0.2, size = 0.5) +  # small, semi-transparent points
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = "complete.obs")
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0("r = ", round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Group, fill = Group),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
```
